title: Solitaire Credit Card
description: Discover the benefits of the Solitaire Credit Card, including unlimited visits to Fitness First, airport lounge access, and exclusive rewards.
mainContent: The Solitaire Credit Card offers a range of benefits including unlimited visits to Fitness First, Mashreq Vantage points for all spends, and complimentary airport lounge access. New customers can enjoy a welcome bonus of AED 2,500, while existing customers gain AED 500 upon qualifying spend. Benefits such as valet parking, complimentary airport transfers, and golf privileges are included. Members can access movie discounts and travel insurance as well. Transparency in fees and a comprehensive guide for rewards and benefits make it a thorough choice for premium banking.
headings: Earn Mashreq Vantage points on all spends

Airport lounge access across the world. Relax in 1000+ airport lounges by presenting your Card at the reception. Both Primary and Supplementary Solitaire Cardholders can visit along with a complimentary guest.
Let us valet park your car, Enjoy 2 free valet parking per billing cycle at premium locations within Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Simply spend a minimum of AED 10,000 in your last billing cycle to avail.
Maximize Mashreq Vantage points on travel and on everyday spends

Travel Insurance Simply purchase travel tickets using your Solitaire Credit Card and enjoy Multi Trip Insurance that covers you for local and international trips of up to 90 days. Click here to get your complimentary travel insurance certificate.

Enjoy 50% discount on movie tickets with no minimum spend - VOX, Reel, and Novo Cinemas: Get 8 movie tickets each month at 50% off. - Cinepolis Cinemas: Get 8 movie tickets each month at 50% off until 31 December 2026.

Car Assistance Services Enjoy 1 complimentary vehicle registration (renewal) pick up and drop off in a year and 2 complimentary vehicle servicing pick up or drop offs in a year. Simply spend AED 10,000 or more to avail.

Tee off at premium golf clubs Enjoy complimentary games of golf per billing cycle at the UAE's exclusive Golf Clubs at Arabian Ranches Golf Club, Abu Dhabi Golf Club, The Track, Meydan Golf, The Els Club and Jebel Ali Golf Club. Maximum of 2 weekend games can be booked per billing cycle. Simply spend AED 10,000 or more in your last billing cycle to avail this benefit.

Complimentary airport transfers to and from Dubai International Airport and Abu Dhabi Airport. Enjoy 6 complimentary airport transfers every calendar year on your card. Simply spend AED 10,000 or more in your last billing cycle. To find out how to book your transfer

Complimentary visits to Fitness First. Keeping fit and healthy is easy with Mashreq Solitaire Credit Card. Enjoy unlimited, complimentary visits to Fitness First whenever you make a minimum spend of AED 10,000 in your previous billing cycle.
Marhaba Silver Meet & Greet Get 6 complimentary Marhaba Meet & Greets per year. Simply spend a minimum of AED 10,000 in your last billing cycle to avail.

Earn Mashreq Vantage reward points for all spends and redeem them instantly via Mashreq Mobile App or at a partner merchant for airmiles, gift cards, cashback and more. Earn 6 points per AED on international purchases, 4 points per AED on airlines, hotels and other travel spends, 2 points per AED on local spends and 1 point per AED on other local spends. To know more, mashreq.com/vantage.

Annual Fee -Primary: AED 1,500 +5% VAT Supplementary: AED 600 +5% VAT -Interest free period - Up to 57 days - Interest rates - 3.85% p.m -PayProtect insurance - 0.99% of your monthly statement balance (+ 5% VAT)
